untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition (EADB chart pattern identification) and pattern height comparison relative to median, which cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators. Pattern completion detection and height measurement are visual/structural pattern metrics not available in the indicator set. Additionally, regime labels 'BULL_MARKET' and 'BEAR_MARKET' are not in the ALLOWED_REGIMES list.
translation_notes: Entry condition uses price breakout above previous high as proxy for pattern completion. Exit condition targets 15% return achieved in first week per source text. Hold period set to 35 days based on weakness warning in bear markets. However, core signal logic (pattern height comparison, pattern structure validation) cannot be translated to technical indicators without pattern recognition capability.
